strategy_description: Fade IV residual vs volume-WLS quadratic smile (m_t=log(K/S)/sqrt(T)); hydrogel spread capture; vega-scaled size. RESID_ENTER=0.012, MAX_Q=18.
Parameter sweep: no hydrogel, stricter thresholds (ENTER=0.02), spread filter MAX_SPREAD=10, aggressive BS delta hedge on extract vs portfolio option delta.
Grid: spread filter on vouchers (<=8), RESID_ENTER=0.015/EXIT=0.005, MAX_Q=12; hydrogel only when spread>=14 with edge 4 and size 5 (lighter than v0).

Residual fade still based on IV minus volume-WLS smile, but only trade liquid strikes VEV_5000..VEV_5500 and fit smile on those same strikes; RESID_ENTER=0.014, RESID_EXIT=0.004, MAX_SPREAD=8, MAX_Q=12. Hydrogel passive quoting unchanged.

Parameter sweep from v3: trade/fitting set widened to VEV_5000..VEV_5500 plus VEV_5200/5300/5400 emphasis retained, RESID_ENTER=0.013, RESID_EXIT=0.0045, MAX_SPREAD=9. Same residual-fade thesis and hydrogel passive leg.
From v3: fit WLS on all ten VEVs; trade 5000–5500; entry spread <=6, RESID 0.0135/0.005. PnL 94 — full-chain fit + 5000 leg hurt day 0 vs v3; superseded by v7.
Drop VEV_5000 from trading; test full-chain fit (all VEV) vs trade 5100–5500. Full-chain refit was worse than v3; dropped for v7.
From v3: self-contained 5-strike WLS on trade strip VEV_5100..VEV_5500 only (omit 5000); same parameters as v3. Superseded by v8 on total PnL.

Parent v7: same 5-strike WLS strip 5100–5500. Add EMA (α=0.12) on raw IV residual per strike for entry signal; exits on raw resid; min top-of-book volume sum 28 for new entries; RESID_ENTER=0.0145, RESID_EXIT=0.0045. New best total in this series.
